name: Web Policy Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof of the webpolicy DMN contract+engine and proof-of-compliance (#1028, slice C). A DMN-style decision table is evaluated through the real PolicyDecisionPoint under each hit policy (FIRST / UNIQUE / PRIORITY / default), then every decision is appended to a hash-linked ProofChain that verifies — and a tampered chain is caught. The app knows only the PolicyRuleSet meta-schema (#406); the rule-evaluator is the swappable seam (#093).
description:
Concept

The runnable proof of the webpolicy DMN contract+engine and proof-of-compliance (#1028, slice C). A DMN-style decision table is evaluated through the real PolicyDecisionPoint under each hit policy (FIRST / UNIQUE / PRIORITY / default), then every decision is appended to a hash-linked ProofChain that verifies — and a tampered chain is caught.

Verified contract

The app knows only the PolicyRuleSet meta-schema (#406); the rule-evaluator is the swappable seam (#093). The runtime under test is the real webpolicy/enforcement.ts PDP and webpolicy/proof.ts hash chain — only the demo hash is a deterministic non-crypto stub.
